title: Colors
description: Hex anchors for the MOK palette. Neutral and vibrant entries seed oklch ramps via create-colors.js; light_dark entries become single colors with auto-derived subdued siblings; palette entries are passed through verbatim. Palette key names (gray/orange/blue/green/red) are preserved from the previous design system to avoid a CSS-wide rename — values are now MOK-aligned (warm cream → charcoal, beech-canopy green, MOK ocean blue).
